findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 31. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The PDF has a two-section side-by-side layout for FY 2020-2021 and Duration of Program data (both Receipts and Disbursements), which is collapsed into a single four-column table in the HTML. While the data is preserved, the visual grouping of two distinct reporting periods as separate sections is lost.
findings.evidence: PDF shows two visually distinct column sections with separate headers 'FY 2020-2021 (through 3/31/21)' and 'Duration of Program (through 3/31/21)' side by side. HTML merges these into a single unified table with four columns.
